awards.topTalentDesc: Honoring the top individuals who excel in every dimension
awards.topProjectDesc: Honoring the outstanding project that delivers exceptional value
awards.topProjectLeaderDesc: Honoring the inspiring manager who leads the project to a breakthrough

kudos.label: Recognition Movement
kudos.title: Sun* Kudos
kudos.description:
WHAT'S NEW IN SAA 2025
For the first time, an activity to recognize and thank colleagues is held for all Sunners. Launching in November 2025, it encourages Sun* people to share recognition and thanks for their colleagues on the system announced by the organizers. This will serve as reference material for the Heads Council during the selection of award winners.

rootFurther.intro1: In the face of the AI era's whirlwind of change and ever-rising customer expectations, Sun* has chosen a strategy of diversifying its capabilities — striving not only to become an elite in its field, but to reach a higher goal where every Sunner is a “problem-solver”: an expert at resolving every issue and finding answers for every challenge of our projects, customers and society.
rootFurther.intro2: Inspired by this diversity of capability, the agility to grow, and the spirit of digging deep to break through in the AI era, “Root Further” was chosen as the official theme of the Sun* Annual Awards 2025.
rootFurther.intro3: Beyond its surface meaning, “Root Further” is the journey of relentlessly reaching farther and rooting stronger — touching the deep “geological” layers to keep surviving, rising, and nurturing the ever-burning passion for creating value that defines Sun* people. Like roots that constantly drive deep into the earth, weaving through every layer of “sediment” to absorb the finest essence, Sun* people are likewise “absorbing” nutrients from the era and the market's challenges to renew themselves each day, expand their capabilities, and firmly “take root” in the AI era — an entirely new “geological” layer, complex and unpredictable, yet brimming with boundless potential and opportunity.
rootFurther.quote: “A tree with deep roots fears no storm”
rootFurther.outro1: Before the storm, only trees with strong enough roots can stand firm. An organization of individuals confident in their diverse capabilities — ready to create and embrace challenges, mastering change — is one that not only stands steady through turbulence but also seizes every advantage and conquers the challenges of the times. More than just the name of a new chapter in our organization's journey, “Root Further” is also an encouragement for each of us to dare to believe in ourselves, dare to dig deep, unlock every potential, break our limits, and become the most versatile, excellent version of ourselves. Because in the AI era, diverse capability and harnessing the power of the times are the prerequisites for endurance.
rootFurther.outro2: No one knows how many mysterious “geological” layers still lie deep in the “earth” of modern technology and markets. We only know that once “Root Further” has become our rooted spirit, we will feel no fear — only excitement before any uncharted territory on the journey ahead. For we always believe that within those infinite realms lie countless wonders and chances to rise.

topTalent.title: Top Talent
topTalent.description: The Top Talent award honors all-rounded outstanding individuals — those who continuously affirm solid professional expertise and superior work performance, consistently deliver value beyond expectations, and are highly regarded by clients and teammates. Ready to take on any mission the organization entrusts, they are a constant source of inspiration, driving motivation and creating a positive impact across the whole team.

topProject.title: Top Project
topProject.description: The Top Project award honors outstanding project teams that achieve business results beyond expectations, optimal operational efficiency, and a dedicated working spirit. These are projects of high technical complexity, excellent optimization of resources and cost, proposing valuable ideas for clients, delivering superior profit and earning positive client feedback. Members strictly follow internal development standards throughout the project, setting a model of excellence and professionalism.

topProjectLeader.title: Top Project Leader
topProjectLeader.description: The Top Project Leader award honors outstanding project managers — those who combine solid management capability, a strong ability to inspire, and the “Aim High – Be Agile” mindset across every problem and context. Under their leadership, members not only overcome challenges and reach their goals together, but also keep their passion burning, the Wasshoi spirit alive, and grow into the finest, happier version of themselves.

bestManager.title: Best Manager
bestManager.description: The Best Manager award honors exemplary leaders — those who have led their teams to results beyond expectations, with a striking impact on business performance and the sustainable growth of the organization. Under their leadership, teams conquer and master every goal through multitasking capability, effective coordination, and a flexible technology-application mindset in the digital era. They inspire the team to be confident and full of energy, ready to embrace — and even lead — revolutionary change.

signatureCreator.title: Signature 2025 - Creator
signatureCreator.description: The Signature award honors individuals or teams that embody the distinctive spirit Sun* pursues in each era. In 2025, the Signature award honors the Creator — individuals/teams with a proactive, sharp mindset who always see opportunity within challenges and pioneer in action. They are sensitive to problems, quick to identify them and deliver practical solutions that bring clear value to the project, the client, or the organization. With a creative mindset and the “Creator” spirit characteristic of Sun*, they not only respond positively to change but also proactively create improvements, helping shape new standards for the way Sun* people create value.

mvp.title: MVP (Most Valuable Person)
mvp.description: The MVP award honors the most outstanding individual of the year — a representative face for the entire Sun* community. They have demonstrated superior capability, enduring dedication, and far-reaching influence, leaving a strong mark on Sun*’s journey throughout the year. Beyond performance and work results, they are a source of inspiration that spreads — through their thinking, actions, and positive impact on the team. The MVP fully embodies the qualities of an outstanding Sun* person, while carrying a great responsibility: to become a role model representing the people and spirit of Sun*, helping lead the community to new heights.

kudos.title: Sun* Kudos
kudos.body:
NEW IN SAA 2025
A movement to recognize and thank colleagues, held for the first time for all Sunners. The activity rolls out in November 2025, encouraging Sun* people to share words of recognition and thanks to colleagues on the system announced by the organizing committee. This will be the material the Heads Council references when selecting award recipients.
